name: GOLFTEC Cleveland West
address: 26669 Brookpark Rd Ext, North Olmsted, OH 44070
about: GOLFTEC is a data-driven golf training facility that combines expert instruction with advanced motion capture and launch monitor technology to provide personalized coaching and club fitting. Their lessons are built on swing analysis using OPTIMOTION motion measurement and high-speed video to identify technical issues and create customized improvement plans for golfers of all skill levels. The facility also offers club fitting services that use launch monitor data and shaft optimization to match players with equipment that can add up to 21 more yards off the tee on average.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION technology and launch monitors
Personalized improvement plans created by expert PGA-certified coaches
Club fitting services that provide measurable distance gains
Practice memberships access to high-tech training bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings, though you can bring your own. They offer a variety of brands and club types for use during sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drink is mentioned as being allowed at the facility. The focus is on golf training and coaching services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for virtual rounds isn't specified, but the facility emphasizes focused skill development over full course simulation.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior golf programs with specialized coaching using their technology to help young golfers understand and improve their swing mechanics.
